# Copilot Instructions

Work in this repository as the independent private Warp control lane.

Use the true project, entity, domain, worker, agent, chatbot, program, or owner-assigned lane name. Do not rename or organize work around Cloudflare, Codex, GitHub, terminal sessions, or any AI/tooling label unless that tool is the actual project.

Cloudflare is only an integration/runtime/provider when explicitly needed; it is not the master repository and does not own this repo.

Keep changes scoped to this Warp control lane. Do not merge unrelated domain, worker, agent, chatbot, business, or credential work into this repo.

No secrets: do not commit API tokens, SSH keys, private keys, account credentials, .env files, or credential-vault material.

For repo-split work, create small reviewed PRs that preserve lane ownership, include a migration manifest, and do not delete source material until owner approval.
